Performance of loop 'iter_loop_inner_loop'in function 'reorder' can be improved with loop rewind inference if the loop can be encapsulated as a standalone function.

Performance of loop 'iter_loop_inner_loop'in function 'reorder' can be improved with loop rewind inference if the loop is called from a region that can be executed in overlapped fashion such as a dataflow region or the top function.

Process fft<fft_params>.2 is made part of the output synchronization in its dataflow region, because it has an external FIFO output and no PIPO output

Process fft<fft_params>.2 has both a successor and writes an output to its caller (see the GUI dataflow viewer). This may lead to lower throughput. Consider copying this output via a successor process.

Cosimulation may deadlock if process fft<fft_params>.2 has a streamed top-level array input and has predecessor processes. If a deadlock occurs, please consider converting the streamed array into an hls::stream

Cosimulation may deadlock if process fft_serial_kernel.1 has a streamed top-level array input and has predecessor processes. If a deadlock occurs, please consider converting the streamed array into an hls::stream

Increasing the depth of FIFO start_for_dma_out_U0 (from entry_proc_U0 to dma_out_U0) to 7 to improve performance and/or avoid deadlocks.

Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

Bundling port 'din', 'dout', 'iter' and 'return' to AXI-Lite port control.
